skills.name: brand-space-research
skills.description: Use when you need to inspect Brand Space metadata, files, search results, and resource content to support grounded brand research or content generation.

skills.name: content-plan-from-trends
skills.description: Use when you need to combine Brand Space, website intelligence, Trending Radar, and AI Chat into a content plan or multi-platform draft set.

skills.name: api-route-debugger
skills.description: Use when you need to inspect authenticated Spira API routes, validate request and response contracts, and document gaps without taking unsafe actions.
